description:
The table presents land cover validation data for `POINT_ID` 31683, including classification codes, various remote sensing imagery, comments, and an embedded Normalised Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) time series chart.

| POINT_ID | Code Map 21 | Code validation | Map 2021 | Google earth / Bing aerial | Sentinel 2 (10m) | Comments |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 31683 | 6 | 8 | [Land cover map image showing blue (water), pink, light green, and brown land areas] | [Google Earth / Bing aerial image showing a landscape with varied brown and green tones, possibly undulating terrain] | [Sentinel 2 (10m) satellite image in false color, showing areas of deep red (vegetation), green, and brown] | Omission class 8 – Lichens and mosses - |
| | | | | | | |
| | | | [Embedded Line Chart: SAMPLE ID: 31683] | | | |

The embedded line chart, titled "SAMPLE ID: 31683", displays Normalised Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) values over time. The Y-axis represents NDVI, ranging from -1.0 to 1.0. The X-axis represents Date, spanning from 2017-07 to 2021-07. Two data series are shown: "NDVI original" (grey diamonds) and "NDVI interpolated" (blue line with small circles). The chart reveals a clear annual cyclical pattern in NDVI, with peak values typically between 0.4 and 0.5 around July/August each year, and trough values near 0.0 or slightly below around January/February, reflecting seasonal vegetation changes.

The `Code Map 21` and `Code validation` columns refer to land cover classification codes used for validation purposes. The `Comments` column highlights an "Omission class 8 – Lichens and mosses", indicating a potential misclassification or error for this land cover type. This comprehensive entry aids in understanding the classification and validation of land cover data for a specific geographic point.
